english translation text:
Dua “Allahumma antal hayyul qayyumul ‘aliyyul ‘adheem”
Tofatus Saaemeen p346b/p340b

In this dua, we praise Allah by his names that signify his Oneness. In every dua when we recognise Allah we find the sentence “salli ala Muhammad wa Aale Muhammad “enveloped” in the dua. We use the salawaat to light up the sentence. After salwaat we ask for Allah’s help. We then ask for forgiveness and mercy from Allah and for our burdens to be removed from us.
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Oh Allah: You are verily the Ever-living, the Self-Subsisting,
the Most High, the All-great,
the Creator, the Sustainer,
the Giver of live, the Causer of death,
the Originator, the Maker.
To You is the Majesty
and to You is the favor,
and to You is all praise,
and to You is thanks,
and to You is magnanimity,
and to You is generosity,
and to You do belong all affairs,
and to You is glory,
and to You is gratitude;
You are alone without having any partner with You.

arabic text: يَا وَاحِدُ يَا أَحَدُ يَا صَمَدُ
english translation text: Oh the One: Oh the Absolute: Oh the Besought of all:

arabic text: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
english translation text: Oh He Who neither begets nor is He begotten,
and there is none like to Him.
(please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and forgive me; and have mercy upon me;
and relieve me from whatever has aggrieved me;
and help me settle my debt;
and expand my provisions;

arabic text: فَإنَّكَ فِي هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ كُلَّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ تَفْرُقُ،
english translation text: for You, at this night, make distinct all affairs of wisdom;
and You grant sustenance to whomever You wish among Your creatures.
So, (please do) grant me sustenance and You are verily the Best of sustainers.

arabic text: فَإنَّكَ قُلْتَ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْقَائِلِينَ النَّاطِقِينَ:
english translation text: You have said—and You are the Best of those who speak and utter—
“Ask Allah of His bounty.”
I thus ask You of Your bounty;
and to You do I turn my face;
and the intercession of Your Prophet’s son do I seek;
and for You do I hope.
So, (please do) have mercy upon me; Oh the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
